name: Evilswarm Zahak
name_jp: ヴェルズ・ザッハーク
desc: If this face-up card you control is destroyed by your opponent's card (by battle or card effect) and sent to your Graveyard: Target 1 Special Summoned Level 5 or higher monster on the field; destroy that target.
mnst_eff: If this face-up card you control is destroyed by your opponent's card (by battle or card effect) and sent to your Graveyard: Target 1 Special Summoned Level 5 or higher monster on the field; destroy that target.
eff: If this face-up card you control is destroyed by your opponent's card (by battle or card effect) and sent to your Graveyard: Target 1 Special Summoned Level 5 or higher monster on the field; destroy that target.

sets.set: Rise of the True Dragons Structure Deck

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
